narrative:
Cols 77-F (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,053 registered voters, with 47.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 29.3%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
